all_trees.title: Max out all 5 Puffish Skills trees — Combat, Mining, Farming, Exploration, Magic

skill_combat.title: Reach level 20+ in Combat (Puffish Skills) — unlocks the highest tier combat perks

subtitle.text: 5 skill trees. 5 paths. Level 20+ in all of them. Your endgame character is defined by what you invested in.

description: CH.15 · PUFFISH MASTERY
▸ Puffish Skills has 5 skill trees.
Each tree gives passive bonuses for the associated activity.
Ch15 is the chapter where you stop being reactive
and start being optimized.
Max out the trees that match your playstyle.
Then max out the others.
◈ THE FIVE SKILL TREES
└ Combat: attack damage, critical hit chance, armor penetration
Best for: boss fights, Cataclysm end chain, Ch17 endgame
└ Mining: ore yield, tool speed, Fortune-equivalent bonus
Best for: Celestisynth ore hunting (Ch15-16), Netherite
└ Farming: crop yield, growth speed, food quality bonus
Best for: Chorus farm, Bolloom farm, Serene Seasons output
└ Exploration: sprint speed, fall resistance, elytra efficiency
Best for: post-dragon world mapping, Via Romana bonus stacking
└ Magic: ISS mana regen, spell damage, casting cooldown reduction
Best for: Eldritch school combat (Ch13-17 boss chain)
◈ SKILL LEVEL SOURCES
└ XP is the primary resource — fight, mine, farm, explore
└ Enderman farm (Ch13-14): best XP/hour source in the pack
└ Boss fights: high XP per kill — the Cataclysm chain levels fast
└ XP Bottles: craft from Bottle o' Enchanting sources
(Lootr dungeon loot, Bountiful quest rewards)
└ ISS casting: grants Magic XP per spell cast
◈ PRIORITY ORDER
└ Max Combat first (Ch17 boss chain requires it)
└ Max Magic second (ISS Eldritch peak damage, Ch17 archmage)
└ Max Exploration third (Elytra efficiency + map traversal)
└ Mining + Farming: invest after the combat trees are done
▸ The skill trees are what the journey taught you.
Every boss fight increased Combat.
Every cave improved Mining.
Every farm improved Farming.
Every exploration leg improved Exploration.
Every spell improved Magic.
By Ch15, most trees are partially filled already.
Ch15 is where you complete the ones that are not.
▶ Max out all 5 Puffish Skills trees [check]
▶ Reach Combat level 20+ [check]
◇ Puffish Skills saves progress across sessions.
The XP is banked — no re-grinding required.
Check your current level with the skills UI
and target the biggest gaps.
Combat + Magic to 20+ is the Ch17 minimum.
